title: ORA Templates — Letter & Form Templates
content: The MSU Office of Research Administration (ORA) provides internal Principal Investigators and Program Directors key templates with instructions for use in creating required letters that must be sent out signed from the ORA. Each letter has both a TEMPLATE (blank fillable) and a SAMPLE (completed example) version. Pre-Award templates: (1) Subaward to MSU Commitment Letter — Template: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/SubAward%20to%20MSU%20Template.docx — Sample: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/Template%20Samples/SubAward%20to%20MSU%20Letter%20Sample.docx — this Commitment Letter is required when MSU is planning to be a subrecipient. (2) Civil Rights Protections for NIH Grants Letter — Template: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/Civil%20Right%20Protections%20Letter%20for%20NIH%20Grants%20Template.docx — Sample: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/Template%20Samples/Civil%20Right%20Protections%20Letter%20for%20NIH%20Grants%20Sample.docx — required for certain NIH grants; check the Funding Opportunity Announcement for specifics. Post-Award templates: (3) Change of PI Request Letter — Template: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/Request%20change%20PI%20template.docx — Sample: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/Template%20Samples/Request%20change%20PI%20Sample.docx — any Change of PI request requires this letter and supporting documentation. (4) No-Cost Extension Letter — Template: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/No%20Cost%20Extension%20Template.docx — Sample: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/Template%20Samples/No%20Cost%20Extension%20Sample.docx — notify ORA no less than 60 days prior to the end date of the award; NSF awards require the No-Cost Extension to be requested through Research.gov, and NIH awards through eRA Commons. (5) Termination of Work Letter — Template: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/Termination%20of%20Work%20Letter%20Template.docx — Sample: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Templates/Template%20Samples/Termination%20of%20Work%20Letter%20Sample.docx — this is the required letter for stop-work orders to contractors or subawardees.
